summary: Second-pair finding closed by EXP-276 P1 swap1 rewrite. The new text explicitly lists Coimbra–San Pablo (75 km) AND Ebro–Coimbra (82 km) as the two pairs that halve into the 85-km band under the stricter R_disc/180 convention, with the third Iberian pair Ebro–San Pablo (157 km) noted as still exceeding 85 km. Same fix as ISS-1688; this is the same hole flagged with sharper specificity.
note: Note to decider: this issue duplicates the one in EXP-276 (ISS-1687/ISS-1688). Same paragraph content, same fix. Closing both at once is appropriate; the duplicate flag came from a re-review pass that picked up sharper detail. EXP-279 (which carried this issue) is marked "ready-for-integration / subsumed_by EXP-276" in expansion-tracker.json.
